mission: Implement the Phase 0 resilience baseline by binding backup coverage, restore rehearsal evidence, runbook freshness, and tuple-aware readiness verdicts into one machine-readable operational snapshot.

gap_resolutions.summary: Backup and restore drills execute now against deterministic local and non-production artifact copies that preserve the same BackupSetManifest, RestoreRun, RecoveryEvidencePack, and OperationalReadinessSnapshot semantics used later in production.
Runbook bindings are machine-readable and freshness-scored now, while richer production rehearsal approvals remain a follow-on hardening seam rather than loose wiki authority.

follow_on_dependencies.summary: Production-grade snapshot orchestration, immutable archival tiers, and operator approval flows may strengthen the same baseline objects without replacing them.
par_102 should consume the OperationalReadinessSnapshot outputs here instead of reconstructing restore posture from dashboards or logs.

manifests.datasetLabel: Transactional domain and settlement authority
FHIR representation and exchange bundle materialization
Audience projection read models and route continuity state
Governed object storage, evidence payloads, and presentation artifacts
Canonical event spine, replay queues, and checkpoint durability
WORM audit ledger, restore evidence, and provenance witnesses
